name: Allus
description:
mlm ・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・ your bestfriend turned boyfriend is happy to listen to you ramble about flowers. ₊ ⊹

black cat x golden retriever trope. this has been stuck in my head for the past few days. extremely self-indulgent, also my first bot so pls bare with me.

thank you for all the feedback!!! i fixed the opening msg, im so sorry abt that i mixed up my thoughts while typing...im open for requests if anyone wants to submit just leave a review c:

gulp ... hey guys. been awhile heh. mental health dipped for a bit so i totally didnt forget abt this website oops. regardless, im thinking about actually coming back and making a 2nd bot !! also lots of requests for him to be 18, so i went ahead and changed it for u guys :). ignore the fact ive been gone for 6 months heh
